name: Beef Jerky#2
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Round steak, chuck steak or roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the meat for approximately 8 hours.
2. Combine the spices in a dish.
3. Cut the meat into strips less than 1/4 inch thick.
4. Remove all visible fat from the meat strips.
5. Sprinkle one side of each strip with the combined seasonings.
6. Beat the seasoned side with a meat mallet until evenly coated.
7. Turn the strips over and repeat the seasoning and beating process.
8. Place the prepared strips on a cookie sheet or flat pan.
9. Bake in an oven set to 120°F for 4 hours, turning the strips once.
10. Return the strips to the oven for another 4 hours.
11. Keep the oven door slightly open throughout the cooking process to allow moisture to escape.
12. Store the finished jerky in a plastic bag or pillowcase; avoid using paper bags.
